jobs.title: Software Engineer

The ideal candidate has experience with JavaScript, Node.js, and cloud services. Responsibilities include collaborating with cross-functional teams, writing clean and testable code, and participating in code reviews.

jobs.title: Site Engineer – Infrastructure (Bridge Works)
jobs.description: We are seeking a qualified and experienced Site Engineer to join our infrastructure team, specializing in bridge construction projects. The successful candidate will be responsible for overseeing on-site activities, ensuring project execution aligns with engineering standards, safety regulations, and quality requirements. Key Responsibilities: - Supervise day-to-day bridge construction activities on site - Coordinate with project managers, contractors, and subcontractors - Ensure compliance with design drawings and technical specifications - Monitor construction progress and prepare site reports - Conduct quality checks and ensure adherence to safety standards - Manage materials, equipment, and workforce allocation - Resolve technical issues arising during construction Requirements: - Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or related field - Proven experience in infrastructure projects, particularly bridge works - Strong knowledge of construction methods, materials, and safety regulations - Ability to read and interpret engineering drawings - Strong leadership and communication skills - Willingness to work on-site

jobs.title: Document Controller
jobs.description: We are seeking a detail-oriented Document Controller with a minimum of 2 years of experience in the construction industry, primarily specializing in infrastructure and bridge projects. Key Responsibilities: - Manage and control project documentation for infrastructure and bridge construction projects. - Ensure proper filing, tracking, and distribution of technical documents, drawings, and correspondence. - Maintain document control logs and ensure accurate version control. - Coordinate with engineers, project managers, and site teams to ensure timely submission and retrieval of documents. - Ensure compliance with project and regulatory documentation standards. - Support audits and project close-out documentation processes. Requirements: - Minimum 2 years of experience as a Document Controller in construction projects. - Experience in infrastructure and bridge projects is mandatory. - Strong knowledge of document control systems and processes. - Proficiency in MS Office and document management software. - Strong organizational and communication skills.
